topic: My phone flashlight casts a second shadow of me that moves on its own.
title: My Phone Flashlight Casts A Second Shadow Of Me | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My phone flashlight throws a second shadow of me onto the wall.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand holding a phone with its flashlight on, two overlapping human shadows cast on a peeling wall, harsh white beam, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I noticed it in my hallway, late, walking to the kitchen.
scenes.image_prompt: a narrow dark apartment hallway, single phone light source, long shadows stretching toward a door, low light, film grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One light. One person. Two shadows.
scenes.image_prompt: a bare wall lit by a single harsh beam, two distinct silhouettes side by side, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first shadow matched me exactly, the way shadows should.
scenes.image_prompt: a silhouette of a standing figure cast crisply on a wall, dim hallway, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
a second blurred human silhouette beside a sharper one, both on a dim wall, eerie low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When I stood still, it kept turning its head toward me.
scenes.image_prompt: two shadows on a wall, one facing forward, one turned sideways, harsh phone beam, fog, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tested it in every room. Always there.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone flashlight illuminating a bedroom wall, double shadow visible, scattered furniture silhouettes, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It only appears under my flashlight. Never any other light.
scenes.image_prompt: a wall half lit by a ceiling bulb showing one shadow, half by a phone beam showing two, contrast, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Lately it raises an arm before I raise mine.
scenes.image_prompt: two wall shadows, one with an arm lifted, the standing figure's arms still down, harsh beam, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night it stepped out of the wall and toward me.
scenes.image_prompt: a darkened room, a shadow detaching from the wall as a freestanding dark shape, phone light glaring, fog, heavy grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the flashlight off now. I walk in the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: a pitch black hallway with a faint phone outline in a hand, no beam, total darkness, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But in the dark I can still feel it walking with me.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty dark corridor with a faint second set of footprints in dust, low light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
